languages.instructions:
Hi there! Welcome to your discovery journey. ?
Before we start, here are three things to know:
This is NOT a school exam. You won't get a "grade" like A or B.
There are no wrong answers. We just want to see how you think and how you feel.
Just be yourself! Some parts are games and some parts are questions. Take your time and have fun!

question.questionText: Look at these 8 pictures. Tap the 4 pictures that look most like what you usually do or choose in your daily life.

options.optionDescription: Ceiling Fan and light on, but no one in room

question.questionText: Look at the list below. Pick 3 things that are most important to you. Put a 1 next to the most important, a 2 next to the second, and a 3 next to the third.

options.optionText: Honesty:Â I tell the truth even when Iâm scared.
Kindness: I help others and show a kind heart.
Hard Work: I try my best, even when itâs difficult.
Fairness: I make sure everyone gets a turn to play.
Bravery: I am brave and try new things.
Learning: I love learning how things work.
Respect: I listen carefully and use polite words.
Patience: I can wait calmly for my turn.
Gratitude: I say "thank you" for what I have.
Order: I keep my things neat and tidy.

...think they can't do what others do.

...think practice makes them smarter.
...think they can't change how smart they are.

...stop working if the task is boring.
...always tell the truth, every time.
...sometimes tell small lies.
...try again if they fail the first time.
...want to stop trying if they make a mistake.
...can be quiet when they are asked.
...find it very hard to stay quiet.
...feel they are good at handling their problems.
...feel they don't know what to do when they have a problem.
...stay calm before a big school test.
...get very nervous before big tests.
...always listen to parents and teachers.
...sometimes don't listen perfectly.
...understand why their friends get upset.
...don't understand why a friend is angry.
...can talk out a disagreement.
...find it hard to fix arguments.
...follow rules even when friends don't.
...break rules if their friends do.
...worry a lot about what others think of them.
...don't worry too much about what others think.
...never say anything mean to others.
...sometimes say things they regret.
...are always happy to share everything.
...sometimes want to keep things to themselves.
...know how to cheer themselves up.
...find it hard to feel happy when sad.
...feel proud of what they do alone.
...only feel good if someone helps them.
...feel brave trying new activities.
...feel scared of new activities.
...like trying new, scary things.
...avoid things that seem scary.
...like to keep the best toys/games.
...feel happy sharing their toys/games.
...are good at waiting for their turn.
...find it hard to wait calmly.
...can wait patiently for their turn.
...find it very hard to wait when they are excited.
...usually stay calm when they get angry.
...find it hard to stop themselves from shouting when they are angry.

...want an adult to fix their mistakes.
...can stand up to bossy people.

instruction.instructionText:
Instructions: On your screen, you will see a sentence that starts with: "Some kids..." Below that, you will see two tabs.
1. Read both tabs carefully. 
2. Click the tab that is TRUE for you.

question.questionText: Diya tells Sona a secret. Later, Sona says the secret in front of everyone because she forgot it was a secret. Why did Sona tell the secret?

options.optionText: She wanted to make Diya feel bad.
She wanted everyone to know.
She simply forgot it was a secret.

question.questionText: Rahul tells his friend, "Great job dropping that catch," in a angry voice after they lose the game. Does Rahul actually think his friend did a good job?

options.optionText: Yes, he is being very nice.
No, he thinks it was on purpose.
No, he is using a "joke" voice to show he is angry.

question.questionText: Kabir hides a toy in the Blue Box. He knows his sister thinks he always lies. When she asks, he tells the truth: "It's in the Blue Box. "Why did Kabir tell the truth?

options.optionText: He wants to be a good boy and stop lying.
He just forgot that he was supposed to hide it.
He wants to trick her so she looks in a different place.

question.questionText: Sameer forgot his lunch. His friend says, "I have way too much food today anyway," and shares her tiffin. Why did the friend say she had "too much" food?

options.optionText: Her tiffin was actually too full.
She did not want to waste her food.
She wanted Sameer to feel okay about taking her food.

question.questionText: A teacher calls a student by the wrong name on the first day of school. Why did the teacher use the wrong name?

options.optionText: She wants to give a new name.
She is playing a trick.
It was an accident because she is still learning names.

question.questionText: Riya finds her mother's hidden chocolates. She eats one and hides the wrapper deep in the dustbin so no one sees it. Why does she hide the wrapper?

options.optionText: She feels bad and does not want to see it.
She knows she is not allowed to eat sweets.
She wants Mom to think the chocolates are still there.

question.questionText: Meera gets a haircut she does not like. Her friend doesn't know Meera is sad about it, She says, "Wow, your hair looks so different!" Why the friend said so?

options.optionText: because the friend thinks the haircut is bad.
because the friend is teasing her.
because the friend is just trying to be nice.

question.questionText: Aditi is playing video games while her dirty clothes are all over the bed. Her mother walks in and asks, "Is this room a new art museum for clothes?" Why did Aditi's mother say this?

options.optionText: She wants to know if Aditi likes going to museums.
She is confused and does not know what a bedroom is.
She is using a joke to show she is angry about the mess.

question.questionText: Ishaan hides a game so his brother doesn't find it, but the brother saw where it was hidden. What does Ishaan think his brother is doing?

options.optionText: Finding the game easily.
Giving up and stopping the search.
Still looking for the game.
